holdings.infoBox: FCTR is an equity ETF with a total of 167 individual holdings. The top holdings are Centene stock at 3.08%, Humana at 2.10%, Super Micro Computer at 1.77%, Bloom Energy at 1.72%, and Axon Enterprise at 1.60%.

overview.description: The First Trust Lunt U.S. Factor Rotation ETF (FCTR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap stocks. Exposure rotates among four investment factors, selected by a risk-adjusted relative strength score FCTR was launched on Jul 25, 2018 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Lunt Capital Large Cap Factor Rotation Total Return Index
